hero.headline: More than a smile,
hero.description: Certified specialists delivering immediate results with the human care you deserve.
hero.desktopDescription: Certified specialists and in-house lab in Turrialba for immediate results with unmatched human care.

services.title: Our
services.subtitle: Complete dental specialties all in one place.

orthodontics.title: Specialized Orthodontics
orthodontics.description: Dental alignment with conventional and aesthetic brackets. Our director is an orthodontics specialist with direct in-clinic care.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.description: Permanent dental implants to replace missing teeth. Procedure performed by an implantology specialist.

endodontics.title: Endodontics (Root Canal)
endodontics.description: Root canal treatment to save dental pieces affected by infections or deep cavities.

pediatric.title: Children's Dentistry
pediatric.description: Dental care for children and teenagers in a friendly and fear-free environment. Provided by Dr. Alina Quesada, general dentist.

periodontics.title: Periodontics
periodontics.description: Diagnosis and treatment of gum diseases and dental support tissue conditions.

chiropody.title: Chiropody (New)
chiropody.description: Professional foot care: callus removal, ingrown nail treatment and podological care. Led by Fabiola.

lab.title: In-House Lab
lab.description: Manufacture of removable and fixed prosthetics. The clinic has its own dental technician — same-day results.

team.title: Our
team.subtitle: Certified specialists ready to serve you.

footer.description: Excellence in dental health with certified specialists and an in-house lab. Committed to your smile and wellbeing in the heart of Turrialba.

booking.title: Book your appointment
booking.subtitle: Select the time that suits you best. Our team will confirm your slot immediately.
booking.successDesc: We have received your request. Our team will contact you immediately to confirm your appointment details.
booking.urgentWhatsapp: In a hurry? Message us on WhatsApp
booking.mobileSubtitle: Leave your details and we'll contact you to schedule your appointment.
booking.mobileSuccessDesc: We'll contact you soon to confirm.
booking.legalNote: Fields marked with * are required. Your information is handled securely and confidentially.
booking.checkboxPrivacy: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions of Turialba Dental. *
booking.checkboxHealth: I expressly authorize Turialba Dental to collect and process the health information I provide in this form, solely for the purpose of managing my medical appointment, pursuant to Costa Rica Law N.° 8968. *
booking.checkboxMarketing: I agree to receive communications from Turialba Dental about services, reminders and updates. I may withdraw this consent at any time. (Optional)

banner.text: We use essential cookies for the site to function and, with your consent, analytics cookies to improve your experience. You can accept or reject non-essential cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: In compliance with Costa Rica Law N.° 8968 — Personal Data Protection Act and its Executive Regulation (Decree N.° 37554-JP), Turialba Dental, located in Turrialba, Cartago, Costa Rica, informs you about the processing of your personal data.
privacy.s2Id: Identification data: full name, phone number and email address (optional).
privacy.s2Health: Health data (special category — requires explicit consent): dental service requested and reason for consultation provided voluntarily.
privacy.s2Tech: Automatic technical data: IP address, browser and device type, pages visited (only if analytics cookies are accepted).
privacy.s3Intro: Your data is used exclusively for:
s3Items: (b) Sending appointment reminders and responding to inquiries.
(c) Marketing communications, only if you expressly authorized them.
(d) Complying with legal obligations under Costa Rican health and tax law.
s4Rows: Explicit consent of the data subject (Art. 9, Law 8968)
Voluntary consent of the data subject
Compliance with applicable Costa Rican law
privacy.s5Text: Your data will not be sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes. Only clinic staff directly involved in your care and technology providers under confidentiality agreements may access it.
privacy.s6Text: If your data is processed by cloud services with servers outside Costa Rica, we ensure those providers meet data protection standards equivalent to Costa Rican legislation.
privacy.s7Text: Data is retained for as long as necessary to provide the service and as required by applicable health and tax legislation. Marketing data is deleted upon withdrawal of consent.
privacy.s8Intro: Under Law N.° 8968, you may at any time:
s8Items: Access the data we hold about you.
Request deletion when data is no longer necessary.
Object to processing for marketing purposes.
Portability: receive your data in a readable electronic format.
privacy.s8Contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at 2556-2673 or info@turialbadental.cr. We respond within a maximum of 5 business days.
privacy.s9Text: We implement SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmission and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, loss or alteration.
privacy.s10Text: We do not collect data from persons under 18 without the express consent of a parent or legal guardian.
privacy.s11Text: We will notify significant changes through the website. The Last updated date at the top of this document always reflects the most recent version.
privacy.s12Text: If you believe your rights have been violated you may contact the Costa Rican Data Protection Agency (PRODHAB): www.prodhab.go.cr — Tel. 2539-6240.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.s1Text: By accessing and using the Turialba Dental website (www.turialbadental.cr), you accept these Terms. If you disagree, we recommend you do not use the site.
terms.s2Text: This website is informational and for appointment management. Published information does not replace an in-person consultation with a healthcare professional.
terms.s3Text: The form generates a request, not an automatic confirmation. The appointment is confirmed when the clinic contacts you. By submitting, you agree to:
s3Items: Notify us at least 24 hours in advance if you need to cancel or reschedule.
Attend at the agreed date and time.
terms.s4Text: Cancellations less than 24 hours in advance may result in loss of the appointment slot. No-shows without notice may lead to special conditions for rescheduling. Justified emergencies are evaluated individually.
terms.s5Text: Site content is for general information only and does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis or treatment. Always consult a healthcare professional directly.
terms.s6Text: All site content (texts, images, design, logo) is the property of Turialba Dental or its licensors. Reproduction without prior written authorization is prohibited.
terms.s7Text: Turialba Dental is not liable for content errors, service interruptions due to technical causes, or damages arising from unauthorized use of the site.
terms.s8Text: The processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, in accordance with Costa Rica Law N.° 8968.
terms.s9Text: These Terms are governed by the laws of Costa Rica. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of the canton of Turrialba, Cartago.
terms.s10Text: Email: info@turialbadental.cr — Tel.: 2556-2673 — Turrialba, Cartago, Costa Rica.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Cookies are small text files that the site saves on your device to remember preferences and improve the browsing experience.
cookies.managementText: When you first visit the site you will see a notice to accept or reject non-essential cookies. You can also manage them from your browser:

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.intro: Turialba Dental is committed to ensuring the accessibility of its website for all people, regardless of their abilities or the device they use.
accessibility.standard: Reference standard: WCAG 2.1 Level AA (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines by W3C).
perceptionItems: Minimum color contrast of 4.5:1 for normal text.
Alternative text on all informative images.
No content that flashes more than 3 times per second.
operabilityItems: 'Skip to main content' link at the start of each page.
Visible focus indicator on all interactive elements.
Minimum 44×44 px touch targets on mobile.
Zoom up to 200% without content loss.
understandabilityItems: Language declared in the HTML code.
Visible labels on all form fields.
Clear error messages and required fields indicated.
robustnessItems: ARIA roles and attributes correctly implemented.
Compatible with NVDA, VoiceOver and TalkBack.
accessibility.limitationsText: Team photos are currently provisional and will be replaced by professional images soon.
accessibility.contactText: Contact us — we respond within 5 business days and work on the solution.
